Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Continued To Sep-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Marilyn Whitley (Co-Administrator)

Ms. Espey stated that the Inventory and Appraisal had not been filed, that there had been multiple issues causing the delay, and requested a two week continuance. The matter was continued to September 10, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
